allow: PowerShell(cd "C:\\Tiim Market Base Loyihasi"; git --version; Write-Output "---GIT BORMI---"; if \(Test-Path ".git"\) { "Git repo: BOR" } else { "Git repo: YO'Q" }; Write-Output "---KATTA FAYLLAR \(MB\)---"; Get-ChildItem -File | Sort-Object Length -Descending | Select-Object -First 15 | ForEach-Object { "{0,8:N1} MB  {1}" -f \($_.Length/1MB\), $_.Name })

PowerShell(cd "C:\\Tiim Market Base Loyihasi"; Write-Output "---KUZATILAYOTGAN FAYLLAR SONI---"; \(git ls-files | Measure-Object -Line\).Lines; Write-Output "---sales.html kuzatilganmi?---"; git ls-files sales.html sales_runtime.js build_all.py 2>&1; Write-Output "---HAMMA O'ZGARISH \(untracked ham\)---"; git status --short --untracked-files=all 2>&1 | Select-Object -First 20)

PowerShell(cd "C:\\Tiim Market Base Loyihasi"; Write-Output "---KUZATILAYOTGAN MAXFIY/KATTA FAYLLAR---"; git ls-files | Where-Object { $_ -match '\\.\(xlsx|json|html\)$' } | ForEach-Object { $sz = \(Get-Item $_ -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).Length/1MB; "{0,7:N1} MB  {1}" -f $sz, $_ })

PowerShell(cd "C:\\Tiim Market Base Loyihasi"; Write-Output "---VERCEL/CONFIG FAYLLAR---"; Get-ChildItem -File | Where-Object { $_.Name -match 'vercel|index|\\.json$' -and $_.Name -notmatch 'data_|Customer|TIN|package-lock' } | Select-Object Name; Write-Output "---index.html bormi---"; if \(Test-Path "index.html"\) { "BOR" } else { "YO'Q" }; if \(Test-Path "vercel.json"\) { "vercel.json: BOR" } else { "vercel.json: YO'Q" }; Write-Output "---build_all.py output target---"; Select-String -Path "build_all.py" -Pattern "sales\\.html|index\\.html|out_path|template_path|embed_html" | Select-Object LineNumber, Line | Select-Object -First 12)

PowerShell(cd "C:\\Tiim Market Base Loyihasi"; Copy-Item "sales.html" "index.html" -Force; if \(Test-Path "index.html"\) { $sz = \(Get-Item "index.html"\).Length/1MB; "index.html yaratildi: {0:N1} MB" -f $sz } ; python -c "import ast; ast.parse\(open\(r'build_all.py',encoding='utf-8'\).read\(\)\); print\('build_all.py: OK'\)")
Bash(node --check "C:\\Tiim Market Base Loyihasi\\sales_runtime.js" && cp "C:\\Tiim Market Base Loyihasi\\sales.html" "C:\\Tiim Market Base Loyihasi\\index.html" && echo OK)
